title: bidens aristosa var. retrorsa
intro: Bidens aristosa var. retrorsa, also known as the Bur-marigold, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive, retrorse (hairs pointing backwards) leaf margins. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Bidens aristosa var. retrorsa include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and to reduce inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
